Conner Myers

Hi, I'm Conner. I graduated in May 2026 with a B.S. in computer science/cybersecurity from Liberty University. I am currently in Denton, Maryland.

Work Experience

In 2017 I enlisted in the United States Air Force. During my four year term I traveled to California, Colorado and New Mexico to work on military satellite communications (MILSATCOM). View my full work history on LinkedIn by clicking the card below, or find my resume at the bottom of the page.

USAF / MILSATCOM (2017 - 2021)

See my full work history on LinkedIn →

Projects

In university I got curious about game development so I took a free course online for Unity. You can check out two prototype games I built below. Note: curb your expectations.

Unity Game Dev Course

About Me

I spent the summer and fall of 2023 living and working on an organic farm in north-western Arkansas. I've since found great joy in growing my own food.
